title: PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd:
PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd!
